author: chuyuan-li
description: Export and share notes as images or PDFs with live preview, watermarks, and split output. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: chuyuan-li
manifest.description: Export and share notes as images or PDFs with live preview, watermarks, and split output.
manifest.name: Note Share Image Exporter

name: Note Share Image Exporter

releases.author: chuyuan-li
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Add an Obsidian CLI-compatible export API via `exportFileToPath()`.
- Support direct export to an absolute output path from `obsidian eval`.
- Add README documentation for Obsidian CLI usage in English and Chinese.
- Fix version bump handling so new plugin versions are added to `versions.json`.

releases.author: chuyuan-li
releases.description: Address Obsidian community submission scanner feedback by removing bundled dynamic script fallback paths.

releases.author: chuyuan-li
releases.description:
Initial release of Note Image Exporter.

- Export notes, selections, and folders as images or PDFs
- Preview exports before saving or copying
- Support PNG, JPG, WebP, and PDF output
- Split long notes by fixed height, horizontal rules, or paragraph-aware auto split
- Add watermarks and author info to exported images
- Support desktop and mobile export flows
